raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/2023 I turned off auto pay ... which was more than enough time for amex to know about it. I get an email today that they are pulling XXXX out and it's being processed yet I know I stopped it on XXXX. When I called amex the man said it was still active which is odd since it was turned off per the advice of an attorney XXXX. So I'm well aware of the fact I turned it off but miraculously it's back on... which I will tell the attorney about. 

The man said he couldn't shut it off as it's being processed ( convenient ) and I am writing to ask they shut it off immediately bc I did that on XX/XX/XXXX and the guy is trying to tell me maybe it's a " glitch ''. 

The bank was also contacted as to what they are doing.
